message:
fix(node): offline coverage tracker handles out-of-order and duplicate telemetry

Previously, record_event() simply overwrote the artifact availability status
on each event, meaning a stale out-of-order telemetry update could incorrectly
flip an artifact's availability state backwards in time.

Changes:
- Replace bare bool tracking with ArtifactState struct carrying (available, timestamp)
- Ignore events with timestamps older than the current state (stale OOO delivery)
- For same-timestamp ties, apply fail-closed semantics: artifact is only
  considered available if BOTH the existing and incoming reports agree it is
  available. This prevents a race condition where one monitor sees availability
  while another sees unavailability at the same instant.
- Newer timestamps simply overwrite as before

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
